race.comment: Lots of angles here. Keen on POMPEII EMPIRE (10) who was runner-up fresh then ran on hard to score here last time. This tougher but drops in the weights and at top and going well. Can measure up. Speaking of measuring up ARIZONA ACTIVIST (5) is a former Victorian from the Hayes yard making debut this area. Has a great record fresh and can hit the ground running for the new barn. REAL VALENTIA (8) may not be in the DAKOTA LEE class but hard to fault recent form and sneaks into this on the minimum. Expected to push forward and give a sight. MOUGENOT (7) is another racing very well and on the minimum. Has a great strike-rate with Luximon aboard.
